labs.name: Defense Absolute
labs.unlock: Unlocked at the start. The [[Lab Upgrades|lab]] increases the increments of each level of the workshop and the maximum workshop value. There are 100 levels.

labs.name: Defense Percent
labs.unlock: unlocked in [[Milestones]] on tier 5 wave 30. There are 50 levels. The lab is added to the workshop totals.

labs.name: Garlic Thorns
labs.unlock: Unlocked at tier 2 wave 1000. There are 10 upgrades. The lab causes Vampire elite enemies to take a % of your thorns damage per second while using its ranged attack.

labs.name: Health
labs.unlock: unlocked at the start. Lab upgrades increase the increments of each workshop level as well as raise the maximum workshop health.

labs.name: Health Regen
labs.unlock: unlocked at the start. The lab increases the increments of each workshop level and raises the maximum workshop value. There are 100 levels.

labs.name: Land Mine Damage
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|Lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 6 wave 30. Increases the amount of damage land mine deals by an additional percent. Has 20 levels.

labs.name: Land Mine Decay
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|Lab]] in [[Milestones]] at Tier 6 Wave 30. Increase the amount of time before land mines explode without being hit. Has 35 upgrades

labs.name: Orb Boss Hit
labs.unlock: Unlocked at tier 6 wave 750. There are 10 levels. The lab allows orbs to deal damage to bosses for a % of their total health.

labs.name: Orb Speed
labs.unlock: Unlocked at tier 3 wave 80. There are 20 upgrades. The upgrades add to the orb speed workshop values.

labs.name: Shockwave Size
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 3 wave 50. Each level adds to the shockwave size workshop value. There are 20 upgrades.

labs.name: Wall Labs/Wall Fortification
labs.unlock: Unlocks lab in Milestones at tier 14 wave 60. Has 60 levels. Allows the wall to regenerate beyond its maximum health. Requires Wall Regen to heal health beyond maximum
